name: RPlog_Mandalore_-_Striking_Out
title: Mandalore: Striking Out
summary: With the dig stalled by Mandalorian politics, Paul Nighman presses negotiations with Dane Noth and Urio'kosh over the price and terms of his expedition before retreating to the bunkroom with Shenner. Their quiet closeness deepens into a charged, intimate moment, interrupted as Paul drifts into a vivid dream of a possible future in which he and Shenner are married with a young son, Marcus, and his mother Anastasia urges him not to become like his father. He wakes to a commotion outside as Mandalorian guards arrive with sudden orders, and the group warily reads the suspicious 'non-emergency' summons. Dane is drawn aside by a disguised guard for whispered words, and tension coils as the warriors trade covert signals and the offworlders ready themselves. Striking out from the hangar, the party makes its way through the powerless, ruined complex to a dark cavern, where the blast doors seal shut behind them and a trap appears to spring.
